summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber National TV Game archive - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a Monthly/Yearly subscriber

**NOTE:** National TV game = Fox Saturday Baseball

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive National TV game tile
steps.result:
THEN buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the game feed
AND the user will see a feed button for the home team
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button
